infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Kisan AI ko aapke shetra ka asli mausam dikhane ke liye location access chahiye.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Kisan AI ko awaaz se sawaal sunne ke liye microphone chahiye.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Kisan AI ko fasal ki photo lene ke liye camera chahiye.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Kisan AI ko fasal ki photo chunne ke liye gallery access chahiye.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Kisan AI ko aapke shetra ka asli mausam dikhane ke liye location access chahiye.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Kisan AI ko aapke shetra ka asli mausam dikhane ke liye location access chahiye.

plugins.photosPermission: Kisan AI ko fasal ki photo chunne ke liye gallery access chahiye.
plugins.cameraPermission: Kisan AI ko fasal ki photo lene ke liye camera chahiye.
